name: Pathology Pound Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 package (12 oz) frozen blueberries, partially thawed
recipeInstructions:
1. With an adult's help, preheat the oven and mix the cake according to package directions.
2. Grease and flour a loaf pan. Pour a half-inch layer of batter into the pan.
3. Using a spoon, gently spread several lines and small pools of strawberry jam over the batter. Repeat until you have covered all the signs of jam with one final layer of batter.
4. Bake according to package directions. After removing from the pan, allow to cool for 35-40 minutes.
5. Beat the whipping cream until stiff peaks form. Add the sugar, then whip for another minute. Using a spoon, gently swirl in 2 tablespoons of the extra strawberry jam and refrigerate until ready to serve the cake.
6. Place the partially thawed blueberries in a Ziploc bag. Seal and lightly pound the berries until they are squished but not completely mushy. Pour into a bowl and add two tablespoons of strawberry jam, mixing well.
7. Slice and arrange the cake on a platter. Place the bloody whipped cream and blueberry "blood clots" beside the platter for guests to use as toppings.
8. Serves 8-10 psycho scientists.
